---
title: "Reunion with Hema"
description: "Catching up with an old colleague."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-05-15"
categories: [personal, photo]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Reunion with Hema.](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

So happy to see you Hema!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_so-happy-to-see-you-hema-activity-6534271045854203904-Sa4o).*
